Bash(gh issue create --title "Task 0.2: Update Ubuntu Packages" --body "Update and upgrade package index inside WSL Ubuntu to ensure latest security patches and tools.

**Commands (WSL Ubuntu)**:
\`\`\`bash
sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y
\`\`\`

**Estimated Effort**: Small
**Dependencies**: Task 0.1" --label "setup,environment,wsl" --milestone 1)

Bash(gh issue create --title "Task 0.3: Install Git inside WSL" --body "Install Git CLI tools, configure global username and email for commits, and verify installation.

**Commands (WSL Ubuntu)**:
\`\`\`bash
sudo apt install -y git
git config --global user.name ""Your Name""
git config --global user.email ""your_email@example.com""
git --version
\`\`\`

**Estimated Effort**: Small
**Dependencies**: Task 0.2" --label "setup,git,wsl" --milestone 1)

Bash(gh issue create --title "Task 0.4: Install VS Code on Windows via Command Line" --body "Install Visual Studio Code using Winget, verify CLI access for extensions and remote WSL usage.

**Commands (Windows PowerShell)**:
\`\`\`powershell
winget install --id Microsoft.VisualStudioCode --source winget
code --version
\`\`\`

**Estimated Effort**: Medium
**Dependencies**: Task 0.1" --label "setup,vscode,windows" --milestone 1)

Bash(gh issue create --title "Task 0.1: Install WSL 2 with Ubuntu" --body "Enable Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) and Virtual Machine Platform, set WSL 2 as default, install Ubuntu, and verify installation.

**Commands (Windows PowerShell)**:
\`\`\`powershell
dism.exe /online /enable-feature /featurename:Microsoft-Windows-Subsystem-Linux /all /norestart
dism.exe /online /enable-feature /featurename:VirtualMachinePlatform /all /norestart
wsl --set-default-version 2
wsl --install -d Ubuntu
wsl --list --verbose
\`\`\`

**Estimated Effort**: Medium
**Dependencies**: None" --label "setup,environment,windows,wsl,phase-0" --milestone 1)

Bash(gh issue create --title "Task 0.8: Test SSH Connection to GitHub" --body "Verify SSH authentication to GitHub works from WSL.

**Commands (WSL Ubuntu)**:
\`\`\`bash
ssh -T git@github.com
\`\`\`

If prompted, type \`yes\` to trust the fingerprint.

**Estimated Effort**: Small
**Dependencies**: Task 0.7" --label "setup,ssh,github,phase-0" --milestone "Phase 0: Environment Setup")
Bash(gh issue close 7 --repo kumaran-naidoo-derivco/jamtrack-radio --comment "Completed: SSH key generated in WSL.")
